description: Serving latest documentation to users on an older release, so documented behavior and examples do not match their version.
body: Failure mode: docs are unversioned and always reflect the newest release, so a user pinned to an older version follows steps and sees flags or defaults that do not exist for them. Detection signals: support reports of 'option not found'; examples requiring features absent in the user's version; no version label on pages. Do not present one doc set as correct for all versions. Safer fallback: version docs per release, label the version, provide migration guides, and ensure each page states which version it describes before publishing.
